name: cuebook
description: Query Cuebook market intelligence or turn a creator-owned trading viewpoint into a Frame with one title, one body, and one paired image.

interface.shortDescription: Query Cuebook data or create a title-body-image Frame
interface.longDescription: Cuebook has two explicit modules. Query searches, reads, compares, and explains Cuebook assets, stories, Frames, evidence, market data, metrics, and history without writing anything. Create preserves and improves the user's trading viewpoint, asks one optional high-leverage heuristic question, then runs one small Cuebook-first evidence pass before returning one recommended Frame. A skip moves directly into creation; three alternatives are produced only when requested. Every Frame has one title, one concise body, and one paired 2488 x 1056 image. Price, trend, relative-strength, volume, and dated-horizon views use a sourced market chart; qualitative mechanisms use a logic card. The observed history window remains separate from the forward horizon, causal hypotheses stay creator-owned, and no future price path is fabricated. One deterministic runner adapts data, renders, hashes, and validates the preview. Release packaging waits until selection. Initial and correction publication use the active publish grant plus the explicit first-party publish action; only withdrawal requires separate consent.
defaultPrompt: 查询 USO 最新叙事、市场状态和来源
比较 HOOD 与 COIN 的最新估值口径和市场表现
我觉得 BTC 未来 30 天会比现在高，帮我做成标题、正文和配图完整的 Frame
